sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24501" key="D.H.ri/fatos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δηρίφᾰτος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῐ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n24501.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀρείφατος</ref></xr>, prob. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.722</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theodorid.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
